# Support

## How to get help

**GitHub Discussions** is the primary support channel for AgToosa:

👉 [Start a discussion](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions/new?category=q-a)

Use the **Q&A** category for questions about setup, configuration, workflow usage, or troubleshooting.

## Before asking

- Check the [README](../README.md) and the workflow files in `template/Docs/`
- Search [existing discussions](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions?discussions_q=) and [closed issues](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed)

## Reporting bugs

Please open a [bug report](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues/new?template=bug.yml) using the issue tracker.

## Security vulnerabilities

Do **not** open a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure instructions.
